name: Rust Toolchain
description: Check, test, lint, and format Rust code using Cargo + Clippy + rustfmt.
instructions: Prefer cargo_check for fast compile-only verification, cargo_clippy for lint-level issues, and cargo_test for the full suite. Run cargo_fmt_check before claiming the work is done. Scope tests with a filter argument when iterating on a specific module.

tools.name: cargo_check
tools.description: Run `cargo check` — fast compile-only verification of the current workspace.

tools.name: cargo_test
tools.description: Run `cargo test` with an optional filter (substring matched against test names).

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Test name filter, empty runs all tests

tools.name: cargo_clippy
tools.description: Run Clippy with warnings treated as errors.

tools.name: cargo_fmt_check
tools.description: Check formatting without applying changes (fails if files are not formatted).
